mapper.select:
/* TimeSaleBensonMapper.getTimeSaleBensonDayList */
SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SALE_DATE, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS SALE_DATE
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_FROM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_TO
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
, A.SALE_HOUR , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_DC_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_DC_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_CNT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_CNT , DECODE(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT), 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_AMT) / SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT))) AS BILL_UPRC , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0) - NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS GA_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS VAT_AMT
FROM TB_SL_DAILY_TIME A , TB_MS_STORE B WHERE A.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND A.SALE_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND B.STORE_CD = A.STORE_CD
AND A.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
GROUP BY A.SALE_DATE , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_DATE , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD
GROUP BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM

/* TimeSaleBensonMapper.getTimeSaleBensonDayExcelList */ SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SALE_DATE, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS SALE_DATE
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_FROM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_TO
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
, A.SALE_HOUR , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_DC_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_DC_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_CNT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_CNT , DECODE(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT), 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_AMT) / SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT))) AS BILL_UPRC , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0) - NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS GA_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS VAT_AMT FROM TB_SL_DAILY_TIME A , TB_MS_STORE B WHERE A.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND A.SALE_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND B.STORE_CD = A.STORE_CD
AND A.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
GROUP BY A.SALE_DATE , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_DATE , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD
GROUP BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM

/* TimeSaleBensonMapper.getTimeSaleBensonMonthList */
SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS SALE_YM
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startMonth}, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS DAY_FROM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endMonth}, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS DAY_TO
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
, A.SALE_HOUR , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_DC_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_DC_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_CNT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_CNT , DECODE(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT), 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_AMT) / SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT))) AS BILL_UPRC , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0) - NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS GA_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS VAT_AMT
FROM TB_SL_MONTHLY_TIME A , TB_MS_STORE B WHERE A.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND A.SALE_YM BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth} AND B.STORE_CD = A.STORE_CD
AND A.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
GROUP BY A.SALE_YM , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_YM , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD
GROUP BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM

/* TimeSaleBensonMapper.getTimeSaleBensonMonthExcelList */ SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS SALE_YM
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startMonth}, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS DAY_FROM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endMonth}, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS DAY_TO
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
, A.SALE_HOUR , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_DC_AMT, 0)) AS TOT_DC_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_CNT, 0)) AS REAL_SALE_CNT , DECODE(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT), 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(A.REAL_SALE_AMT) / SUM(A.REAL_SALE_CNT))) AS BILL_UPRC , SUM(NVL(A.REAL_SALE_AMT, 0) - NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS GA_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS VAT_AMT FROM TB_SL_MONTHLY_TIME A , TB_MS_STORE B WHERE A.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND A.SALE_YM BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth} AND B.STORE_CD = A.STORE_CD
AND A.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
GROUP BY A.SALE_YM , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_YM , A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD
GROUP BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
ORDER BY A.SALE_HOUR
, A.STORE_CD , B.STORE_NM
